h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is expected to continue following the tutor's step-by-step instructions to label and read the carbon tile.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence:
Upper mark, 6: atomic number.
Symbol box, C: symbol.
Name line, carbon: name.
Lower mark, 12.01: atomic mass.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully recalls and states all four hidden labels based only on their positions and values while the labels are covered.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner pressure or failure to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism was triggered by learner pressure.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to take up.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence:
Upper mark, 6: atomic number.
Symbol box, C: symbol.
Name line, carbon: name.
Lower mark, 12.01: atomic mass.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully recalls and states all four hidden labels based only on their positions and values while the labels are covered.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to take up.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner pressure or failure to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner pressure or failure to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism was triggered by learner pressure.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to systematically label and distinguish the forces acting on the cart as guided by the tutor.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Push: hand on cart. Friction: table on cart, left contact mark. Normal: table on cart, upward contact mark. Gravity: Earth on cart. The two table cards need their force names first, or they look too much alike.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully executes the complete classification of forces and independently formulates a representational rule to keep the two table-contact forces distinct.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The learner experiences no breakdown or resistance, so there is no pressure triggering a dramatic tutor reversal.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism was triggered because the learner proceeded smoothly without blockage.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn in this transcript, so no contingent tutor uptake can be evaluated.
